CustomField.description: Custom Field used by the automated invoice setting creation process. When populated the flow 'Invoice Settings auto creation' will create Invoice Settings specific to this Contract ID. Once completed this field will be cleared.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Custom Field used by the automated invoice setting creation process. When populated the flow 'Invoice Settings auto creation' will create Invoice Settings specific to this Contract ID. Once completed this field will be cleared.
CustomField.label: WFMContractID
